summary: POTUS retweet of a WhiteHouse video. Montage set to a sung America-the-Beautiful-style track (lyric fragment 'Where skies are on...'). It cuts between a slow-motion shot of Trump and family members standing before a large rippling American flag, a backlit close-up of Trump smiling in a red 'MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN' cap, a graphic reading 'FOX NEWS PROJECTS - TRUMP ELECTED 47TH PRESIDENT', and a shot lit with red and gold bokeh. It ends on a black card with a white line-art White House and the text 'PRESIDENT DONALD J. TRUMP.'

script.scene: Slow-motion shot from behind of Trump and family members standing before a large rippling red-and-white American flag. Music begins; lyric '...where skies are...'
Backlit close-up of Trump smiling at a podium microphone, wearing a red 'MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN' cap and pink tie; crowd behind.
Election-night graphic: 'FOX NEWS PROJECTS - TRUMP ELECTED 47TH PRESIDENT' with a checkmarked Trump photo and a Georgia results bar (Harris 48.4% / Trump 50.8%).
Shallow-focus shot lit with red and gold bokeh of Trump and a woman seen from behind walking into an ornate room.
End card on black: white line-art illustration of the White House with text 'PRESIDENT DONALD J. TRUMP.'

notable_text: MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN; FOX NEWS PROJECTS TRUMP ELECTED 47TH PRESIDENT; GEORGIA PRESIDENT HARRIS 48.4% TRUMP 50.8%; PRESIDENT DONALD J. TRUMP; tweet (RT @WhiteHouse): 'Back to loving America again'
